visa_types.name: Temporary Visitor Visa for Tourism (Sightseeing)
visa_types.documents_required:
Document Checklist 
                                                                    
Note: Kindly arrange the documents in the same
                                                                        order as outlined in Document Checklist and
                                                                        attach a copy of it along with your visa
                                                                        application form.
Important-Please note all photocopies should be
                                                                        on A4 size only
visa_types.processing_time:
The time to process an application for any kind
                                                                        of visas depends on the applicant’s
                                                                        circumstances. Minimum processing time, it takes
                                                                        at least six (6) business days  if
                                                                        the documentation is in order. There are some
                                                                        cases, however, in which over a few weeks or
                                                                        more are needed. It should be noted that the
                                                                        embassy does not issue any visas on the same day
                                                                        of application.
Please make sure to apply in advance to avoid any
                                                                        inconvenience.
visa_types.forms:
Please submit one completed and signed Visa Application form along with your application

Visa Application form 

- 
Letter of Guarantee
-  
Invitation letter
-  
Details of Company /Organization
-  
Itinerary in Japan
Kindly refer to General  Information to the Applicants Applying for  Visa to Japan at the Embassy of Japan, Islamabad | Embassy of Japan in Pakistan (emb-japan.go.jp) (https://www.pk.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_ja/VisaInfo.html) for further details
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa allows people to visit Japan for a
                                                                        holiday or recreation for a stay up to 90 days.
                                                                    
Note: Only residents of Sindh and Baluchistan can apply at the Japan Visa Application Centre in Karachi.
You cannot submit your visa application if your travel date is after 90 days of your application submission date.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa allows people to visit Japan for a
                                                                        holiday or recreation for a stay up to 90 days.
                                                                    
Note: Only residents of Sindh and Baluchistan can apply at the Japan Visa Application Centre in Karachi.
You cannot submit your visa application if your travel date is after 90 days of your application submission date.

## Visa Fees And Service
                                                                        Charges

You must pay the applicable Visa fee and Service
                                                                        fee when submitting your application. The Please
                                                                        refer to the table given below to know your visa
                                                                        fees.
Visa Fees (General):

[Table:Temporary Visitor Visa for Tourism (Sightseeing)]
Visa Fees (For Indian) :

[Table:Temporary Visitor Visa for Tourism (Sightseeing)]
Please Note:
Service Charges : In addition to the standard visa fees, service fees will be charged by Japan Visa Application Centre.
There is a service charge of PKR 3500 or 12.5$ (inclusive of all taxes) levied per application. Service fees will be paid online at the time of booking an appointment .
All other charges (Visa Fee and other optional charges) are to be paid in cash only in PKR in Pakistan.
Visa Fee is refunded only if the visa is not approved by the Embassy. Service/Courier Charge are inclusive of all taxes and non-refundable.
Pakistan passport holders are exempt from visa fee.
For list of nationalities who are exempt from visa fee , click on this

## Documents Required

Document Checklist 
                                                                    
Note: Kindly arrange the documents in the same
                                                                        order as outlined in Document Checklist and
                                                                        attach a copy of it along with your visa
                                                                        application form.
Important-Please note all photocopies should be
                                                                        on A4 size only

## Photo Specifications
One recent and latest photograph of applicant
                                                                        with light background preferably white, having
                                                                        size of 45mm x 45mm.

## Processing Time
The time to process an application for any kind
                                                                        of visas depends on the applicant’s
                                                                        circumstances. Minimum processing time, it takes
                                                                        at least six (6) business days  if
                                                                        the documentation is in order. There are some
                                                                        cases, however, in which over a few weeks or
                                                                        more are needed. It should be noted that the
                                                                        embassy does not issue any visas on the same day
                                                                        of application.
Please make sure to apply in advance to avoid any
                                                                        inconvenience.

## Download Forms
Please submit one completed and signed Visa Application form along with your application

Visa Application form 

- 
Letter of Guarantee
-  
Invitation letter
-  
Details of Company /Organization
-  
Itinerary in Japan
Kindly refer to General  Information to the Applicants Applying for  Visa to Japan at the Embassy of Japan, Islamabad | Embassy of Japan in Pakistan (emb-japan.go.jp) (https://www.pk.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_ja/VisaInfo.html) for further details

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A stay during which the applicant performs
                                                                        remunerative work (professor, journalist,
                                                                        researcher, engineer etc.) in Japan or a stay of
                                                                        over 90 days (student, trainee, etc.) in Japan.
                                                                        Please
                                                                        click here (https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/long/index.html) for more
                                                                        details.
                                                                    
The certificate of eligibility issued by the
                                                                        Immigration Bureau of Japan must be submitted to
                                                                        apply this category.
- Procedures chart for
                                                                                work or long-term stay (https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/process/long.html)
Note: .Only residents of Sindh and Baluchistan can apply at the Japan Visa Application Centre in Karachi.
Visa Applicants applying for Long Term Stay category who are unable to get appointment online at our Islamabad Centre can visit us at 2pm and our staff can assist in booking an appointment in the next available slot (subject to availability *)}
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A stay during which the applicant performs
                                                                        remunerative work (professor, journalist,
                                                                        researcher, engineer etc.) in Japan or a stay of
                                                                        over 90 days (student, trainee, etc.) in Japan.
                                                                        Please
                                                                        click here (https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/long/index.html) for more
                                                                        details.
                                                                    
The certificate of eligibility issued by the
                                                                        Immigration Bureau of Japan must be submitted to
                                                                        apply this category.
- Procedures chart for
                                                                                work or long-term stay (https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/process/long.html)
Note: .Only residents of Sindh and Baluchistan can apply at the Japan Visa Application Centre in Karachi.
Visa Applicants applying for Long Term Stay category who are unable to get appointment online at our Islamabad Centre can visit us at 2pm and our staff can assist in booking an appointment in the next available slot (subject to availability *)}

## Visa Fees And Service
                                                                        Charges
You must pay the applicable Visa fee and Service
                                                                        fee when submitting your application. The Please
                                                                        refer to the table given below to know your visa
                                                                        fees.
Visa Fees (General):

[Table:Temporary Visitor Visa for Tourism (Sightseeing)]
Visa Fees (For Indian) :

[Table:Temporary Visitor Visa for Tourism (Sightseeing)]
Please Note:
Service Charges : In addition to the standard visa fees, service fees will be charged by Japan Visa Application Centre.
There is a service charge of PKR 3500 or 12.5$ (inclusive of all taxes) levied per application. Service fees will be paid online at the time of booking an appointment .
All other charges (Visa Fee and other optional charges) are to be paid in cash only in PKR in Pakistan.
Visa Fee is refunded only if the visa is not approved by the Embassy. Service/Courier Charge are inclusive of all taxes and non-refundable.
Pakistan passport holders are exempt from visa fee.
For list of nationalities who are exempt from visa fee , click on this

## Documents Required

Long Term Checklist 
Note: Kindly arrange the documents in the same
                                                                        order as outlined in Document Checklist and
                                                                        attach a copy of it along with your visa
                                                                        application form.
Important-Please note all photocopies should be
                                                                        on A4 size only

## Photo Specifications
One recent and latest photograph of applicant
                                                                        with light background preferably white, having
                                                                        size of 45mm x 45mm.

## Processing Time
The time to process an application for any kind
                                                                        of visas depends on the applicant’s
                                                                        circumstances. Minimum processing time, it takes
                                                                        at least six (6) business days  if
                                                                        the documentation is in order. There are some
                                                                        cases, however, in which over a few weeks or
                                                                        more are needed. It should be noted that the
                                                                        embassy does not issue any visas on the same day
                                                                        of application.
Please make sure to apply in advance to avoid any
                                                                        inconvenience.

## Download Forms
Please submit one completed and signed Visa Application form along with your application

Invitation letter

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa allows business people to make multiple
                                                                        short business visit to Japan for up to 90 days
                                                                        during your visa validity period. Business
                                                                        activities may include a conference, negotiation
                                                                        or exploratory business visit.
Note: Only residents of Sindh and Baluchistan can apply at the Japan Visa Application Centre in Karachi.
- You cannot submit your visa application if your travel date is after 90 days of your application submission date.
visa_types.full_text:
